identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Botanical Serendipity' experience that feels like a digital wedding favor, not a utility app.
core_values: Fusion: Botanical Illustration x High-End Stationery x Modern Dating UI
Content: Every screen is a page in a guest book
Contrast: Soft paper textures vs. Sharp typography

usage_rules.background: Use 'Bone White' (#F9F9F7) as the main canvas. Avoid pure white #FFFFFF for backgrounds.
usage_rules.primary: Use 'Sage Green' (#7C9082) for primary actions (Buttons, Active States).
usage_rules.secondary: Use 'Dusty Rose' (#D4A5A5) for romantic accents (Likes, Hearts, Matches).
usage_rules.text: Use 'Charcoal' (#2C3E50) for text. Never use pure black.
usage_rules.gradients: Avoid gradients. Use solid colors or subtle paper textures.

textures.paper: bg-[url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/cream-paper.png')] opacity-50 mix-blend-multiply pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-0

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background relative overflow-hidden shadow-2xl
layout.grid_strategy: Use 'Bento' grids for the dashboard. Use 'Stack' layouts for mobile views.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-serif transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-primary/20 text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-sans transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.profile: bg-white p-4 pb-12 shadow-xl rotate-1 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform duration-300 border border-border/50 relative
cards.match: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-lg rounded-2xl p-4

inputs.default: bg-white border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 font-sans text-lg shadow-sm transition-all

backgrounds.description: Elegant floral table setting, use for Landing Page Hero background with overlay
Blurred wedding reception lights, use for Auth pages or Match screen background

profiles.description: Elegant man in suit, use for mock profile
Elegant woman in dress, use for mock profile

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a mobile-first web app. Treat the desktop view as a 'Dashboard' for the bride/groom, but the main guest experience is strictly mobile-optimized (max-w-md mx-auto).
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors provided. Add the fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in index.html.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and swipe gestures. The swipe card stack is the core interaction.
instructions_to_main_agent.ai_features: The AI conversation starters should appear as 'Toast' notifications or 'Floating Bubbles' in the chat, not as a separate boring list.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
